incident_summary: QMS audit trail did not record data change to batch A7523B record — change made by OP-4109 not captured. Identified during 21 CFR Part 11 compliance audit.
root_cause_detail: Audit trail feature had been inadvertently disabled during routine system maintenance by IT team. Feature disabled for {days()} days — {random.randint(10,50)} batch records affected.
corrective_action: Audit trail re-enabled. Affected records reviewed — all changes traced through secondary records (paper, CCTV, operator testimony). No data integrity concerns confirmed.
preventive_action: Audit trail status verification added to post-maintenance checklist — mandatory before system returned to production use. Audit trail status monitored daily by IT compliance.
effectiveness_check: Audit trail 100% active for 12 months on monthly IT compliance report. Zero 21 CFR Part 11 findings at next regulatory inspection.
